---
title: "Mergent Municipal Bond Database"
page-layout: article
---

# Mergent Municipal Bond Database

## Description

Dataset of municipal bond attributes with historical coverage dating back several decades. Supports fixed income, public finance, and municipal market research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy, Humanities & History
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Historical Archives
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Market Research, Historical Archives

## Links

- [Access resource](http://search.library.yale.edu/catalog/14077868)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
